indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and lacks a dedicated workspace for computer work.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is not designed for extended computer use and lacks ergonomic support.

indicators.name: potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants can be distracting and take up valuable space.

indicators.name: cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: Cabinets are not designed for computer work and can be visually distracting.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: Wood flooring can be slippery and may not be suitable for prolonged standing.

indicators.name: ceiling-merged
indicators.rationale: The ceiling is too high and may not provide enough headroom for tall users.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The dining table and chairs are not designed for extended computer use, and the presence of potted plants and cabinets can be distracting. The wood flooring and high ceiling may also pose challenges for prolonged standing or working.
